name.full: Advanced Productivity Toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork

description.short: Create branded slide decks and edit tech-demo videos inside Cowork.
description.full: A content-production toolkit for M365 Copilot Cowork bundling two skills. slide-template-creator builds a polished .pptx by generating body slides with pptxgenjs and bolting the corporate template's brand cover and closing pages onto the front and back (triggers: 製作簡報, slide deck, presentation, PowerPoint, 投影片). tech-demo-video-RMT turns a raw product screen-recording into a focused, captioned final video with Remotion + ffmpeg — reading the clip, proposing an edit plan for approval, then trimming, speeding up, adding captions/music/blur, and exporting only the final .mp4 (triggers: edit this tech demo, 剪這支 demo 影片, 產品示範影片剪輯, quick video edit).
